By default, this will remove the Azure m: By default, this will remove the Azure managed namespace and project labels from the following namespaces:

Warning: This action cannot be undone. A: Warning: This action cannot be undone. All resources in these namespaces will be permanently deleted.
Note: For AKS managed namespaces, Azure: Note: For AKS managed namespaces, Azure ARM management will be removed automatically.
By default, the service port matches the: By default, the service port matches the target port. Enable this to use a different port for the service.
Use ClusterIP. Best for services that ar: Use ClusterIP. Best for services that are only reachable within the cluster.
Creates a LoadBalancer to expose the app: Creates a LoadBalancer to expose the application to the internet.
By default, probes use HTTP GET on the r: By default, probes use HTTP GET on the root path with sensible defaults. Enable this to customize probe settings.
Kubernetes restarts the container if thi: Kubernetes restarts the container if this check fails repeatedly.
Kubernetes won't send traffic to the pod: Kubernetes won't send traffic to the pod until this check passes.
Kubernetes temporarily disables liveness: Kubernetes temporarily disables liveness/readiness until startup succeeds.
The minimum amount of CPU guaranteed to: The minimum amount of CPU guaranteed to the container. Kubernetes will schedule the pod on a node with at least this much CPU available.
The maximum amount of CPU the container: The maximum amount of CPU the container can use. If exceeded, the container will be throttled.
The minimum amount of memory guaranteed: The minimum amount of memory guaranteed to the container. Kubernetes will schedule the pod on a node with at least this much memory available.
The maximum amount of memory the contain: The maximum amount of memory the container can use. If exceeded, the container will be terminated (OOMKilled).
HPA scales pods based on CPU utilization: HPA scales pods based on CPU utilization.
The target average CPU utilization perce: The target average CPU utilization percentage across all pods. HPA will scale up when CPU usage exceeds this value and scale down when it's below.
Ensure min ≤ max replicas and target CPU: Ensure min ≤ max replicas and target CPU between 10% and 95%.
Configure security context settings for: Configure security context settings for the container.
Ensures the container runs as a non-root: Ensures the container runs as a non-root user for better security.
Mounts the container's root filesystem a: Mounts the container's root filesystem as read-only to prevent write operations.
Controls whether a process can gain more: Controls whether a process can gain more privileges than its parent process.
Prefer scheduling pods on different node: Prefer scheduling pods on different nodes to improve availability and fault tolerance.
Distributes pods evenly across nodes to: Distributes pods evenly across nodes to improve workload distribution.
Add one or more Kubernetes manifests. Up: Add one or more Kubernetes manifests. Upload files to populate the editor or paste/edit directly below.
Deploy from Azure Container Registry, Do: Deploy from Azure Container Registry, Docker Hub, or GHCR
Guided configuration for ports, replicas: Guided configuration for ports, replicas, env, and resources
No Kubernetes expertise required to get: No Kubernetes expertise required to get started

Use existing manifests for full control: Use existing manifests for full control
